gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the daily app metrics across the ecosystem.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in the documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase and README up-to-date with the latest usage and health data.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot is holding a clipboard or scanning plants (representing apps) to record their daily metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot inspecting a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot inspecting a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
